arts.ttl: Man Utd fans FUME ahead of new signing's long-awaited debut
arts.sum: Chido Obi-Martin is set to make his debut for Manchester United's U18s on Saturday, but fans will not be able to watch. Obi-Martin is poised to make his long-awaited debut for the Red Devils in a U18 game against Sunderland on Saturday, with the striker said to initially be named among the substitutes.

arts.ttl: Why Harry Amass is not playing for Man United amid left-back dilemma as Erik ten Hag plan clear
arts.sum: Harry Amass has not featured in a Manchester United matchday squad so far this season.

arts.ttl: 'Dressing room would eat him alive' – Man Utd player's bombshell claim over manager target
arts.sum: Brentford manager Thomas Frank has been linked with the Manchester United job amid ongoing doubts about Erik ten Hag's future, though it sounds like some of the players wouldn't fancy him

arts.ttl: Man United confirmed XI: Do Alejandro Garnacho, Matthijs de Ligt, Lisandro Martinez start vs. Brentford?
arts.sum: Manchester United confirm their starting lineup for this afternoon's Premier League clash against Brentford. Do Alejandro Garnacho, Matthijs de Ligt and Lisandro Martinez make the first XI?

arts.ttl: Thomas Frank gives Erik ten Hag verdict amid rumours of Man Utd replacement
arts.sum: "I've experienced it too many times in my career: we face a team that has lost three games in a row but they come out absolutely flying," he continued. Brentford manager Thomas Frank has condemned the criticism of Manchester United boss Erik ten Hag.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag responds to Man Utd's decision to end Sir Alex Ferguson payments
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has insisted he expects Sir Alex Ferguson to remain an active part of life at Manchester United despite the termination of his ambassadorial contract. "Sir Alex, of course, is Man Utd, he built United to where the club it is now, and it impacts us.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson not attending first Man Utd game since being 'banned from dressing room'
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Sir Alex Ferguson learned that his ambassadorial contract would be axed at the end of the season earlier this week in a move that has divided opinion

arts.ttl: Manchester United vs Brentford - 3pm Premier League fixtures: Live score, team news and updates as Jonny Evans starts for Erik ten Hag's side... plus updates from the other 3pm games
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog of all the 3pm Premier League fixtures to be kept up-to-date on all the action from the five games including Man United vs Brentford, Fulham vs Aston Villa and more.

arts.ttl: Manchester United squad vs Brentford confirmed as two youngsters added
arts.sum: Man Utd are suffering from injuries again and a teenager yet to make his first-team debut has arrived with the squad at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson set to miss Man United v Brentford match after Ineos decision
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson will step down as Manchester United's ambassador at the end of the season as Ineos look to cut-down costs at the club.
